text: Humne toh sirf ek shaks khoya tha, Par unhone toh apni wafa hi kho di. 💔😭🥀🖤🩹
Kash tujhe meri zarurat ho meri tarah, Aur main tujhe thukra doon teri tarah. 🥀🔥🚫🥺💔
Wo jo kehte the hum mar jayenge tumhare bina, Aaj kisi aur ke sath khush hain. 💔😭🚬🥀🚫
Kitna ikhtiyar tha usey meri dhadkano par, Wo khamosh hui toh meri saansein rukne lagi. 💔🥺🥀💤💀
Maut se keh do humse dushmani kar le, Apno ne toh zeher de kar mar hi dala hai. 😭💔🚬🥀🔥⚰️
Zakhm itne gehre hain ki dikhaye nahi jate, Dard itna hai ki sunaye nahi jate. 💔😭🥀🩹🖤🤐
Dil todne wale ko kya pata ki dard kya hota hai, Ye toh tootne wala hi janta hai. 💔🥀😭🥺🩹
Insaan tab nahi marta jab saansein rukti hain, Wo tab marta hai jab apna thukra deta hai. 💔😭🥀💀🩹
Meri khamoshi ko mera guroor mat samjho, Main bas thak gaya hoon logon ko samjhate samjhate. 🤐💔😭🥀🩹
Khatam ho gaya unka pyar jo kehte the ki hum sirf tumhare hain. 💔😭🥀🚫🔚
